# thatsRekt — on-chain hack alerts for the public good.
# All routes are public and indexable.

User-agent: *
Allow: /

# Two sitemaps: a static one with the SPA shell routes (`/`, `/about`,
# `/posters`, `/docs`) and a dynamic per-post sitemap generated by the
# Mesh gateway from indexer data. Search engines accept multiple
# `Sitemap:` lines in robots.txt — both will be crawled.
Sitemap: https://thatsrekt.com/sitemap.xml
Sitemap: https://thatsrekt.com/sitemap-attacks.xml
